name: GetAlertSummary
description: Fetches alert summary for the last 12h or 24h. Use when the user asks about alerts, alert summary, or alert statistics. Returns data in table format.

name: GetBankServicesHealth
description: Checks health of bank services (account, payments). Use when the user asks about service status, health check, or whether services are running.

name: GetAppRunnerServiceStatus
description: Fetches App Runner service status (account-service, payments-service). Checks if service is RUNNING or PAUSED. If PAUSED – propose resuming and ask user for acceptance.
